name: StoreFront
tagline: Sell online without giving away your margins
metaDescription: StoreFront replaces Shopify with a complete e-commerce platform inside AppBuster. List products, process orders, and grow revenue — saving $948/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🛒</text></svg>

features.title: Product Catalog
features.desc: List unlimited products with variants, images, and detailed descriptions. Organize your inventory with categories, tags, and smart collections that update automatically.

features.title: Secure Checkout
features.desc: PCI-compliant checkout that supports credit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Customize the checkout flow with upsells, order bumps, and abandoned cart recovery.

features.title: Order Management
features.desc: Process, fulfill, and track orders from a single dashboard. Automatically generate shipping labels and send tracking notifications to customers.

features.title: Sales Analytics
features.desc: Monitor revenue, average order value, and conversion rates in real time. Drill into product performance, traffic sources, and customer lifetime value.

features.title: Multi-Channel Selling
features.desc: Sync your catalog to social media shops and marketplaces. Manage inventory across channels from one place so you never oversell.

features.title: Inventory Management
features.desc: Track stock levels across locations with low-stock alerts and automatic reorder points. Bulk update quantities via CSV or barcode scanning.
